findings.description: Phase 3 complete. DynamicSelector, ConsistencyAnalyzer, GamingDetector, CertaintyIndicator, ScoringEngine built and tested. 78 tests, 0 failures. SupersetOptimizer (3.7, 3.15) deferred — needs multiple assessment banks to test against.
SupersetOptimizer built and tested. Cross-scoring optimization across multiple assessments. 84 tests, 0 failures. Phases 1-3 complete.

Phase 4 complete. All 10 P0 assessment question banks generated: 1,440 questions total. Attachment (150), Communication (200), Conflict (120), Regulation (150), Forgiveness (150), Self-Worth (120), Boundary (100), Big Five (150), Love Languages (100), Cognitive Distortions (200). All schema-compliant.

Phase 5 complete. All 10 P1 assessment banks generated: 1,290 questions. Humor Style (110), Humor Compatibility (150), Emotional Intelligence (120), Multiple Intelligences (150), Common Sense (150), Decomposition Thinking (120), Independent Critical Thinking (120), Pattern Awareness (100), Dashboard Light (120), Parenting Style (150). Running total: 2,730 questions across 20 assessments.

Phase 6 complete. 14 entertainment/hobby banks generated: 1,120 questions. Cinema (120), TV (100), Reader (100), Soundtrack (100), Gaming (80), Content Diet (80), Sports (60), Food (80), Travel (80), Fitness (60), Creative (60), Social (80), Nature (60), Hobby Meta (60). Running total: 3,850 questions across 34 assessments.
